scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const p of ['node_modules','package-lock.json']){fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});}console.log('cleaned node_modules and package-lock.json');"
scripts.verify:core: npm test --workspaces && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run build --workspace core-rules-engine && node ./core/rulesEngine/dist/bin/cli.js --fixture core/rulesEngine/fixtures/simple-peak.json
scripts.verify:fixtures: npm run build --workspace core-rules-engine && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),{execSync}=require('child_process');const dir='core/rulesEngine/fixtures';fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')).forEach(f=>{const p=path.join(dir,f);execSync('node core/rulesEngine/dist/bin/cli.js --fixture '+p+' --verify',{stdio:'inherit'});});"
